developer.heading: About Me
developer.name: Evan Hassan
developer.description: A dedicated front-end developer specializing in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.js seeking opportunities to deliver an exceptional user experience. Committed to continuous learning, refining my skillset and taking on new challenges.
developer.bio: Creative, diligent, detail-oriented individual who is passionate about front-end web development, landing page design, JavaScript, and especially music.  By starting off my day with a coding challenge, I activate my programming mode.  My approach to work and school projects has been to research and analyze the assignment, to collect my ideas, to create a solution, and finally to make a product uniquely crafted for each user.  My objective is to develop websites / web applications that are responsive, accessible, and performant.  HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue, and Nuxt are my prime tools for creating great web experiences.

education.title: Education
education.description: I attended Oakland University where I pursued a degree in Information Technology, graduating with magnum com laude honors. I had the opportunity to participate in numerous group projects. I am a consistent team member who provides 110% effort to meet project deadlines. During my studies at OU, I received the Udacity Nanodegree scholarship for a front-end web development program affiliated with Google and other Tech companies. Udacity provided the momentum for me to explore the comprehensive details of web development. As a result, I have gained an appreciation for clean responsive design, and strive to implement these principles. I continue coursework to expand my IT skillset.

workExperience.description: Independent contract position providing IT solutions, website / web app creation,  data analytics, and site performance optimization.

Completed a redesign of the website to deliver an engaging visual layout and improved usability. Continue to maintain site and create necessary enhancements, provide technical support and IT solutions.

Software development position specializing in websites and web applications for live events, trade shows, and conferences. Developer responsibilites include maintainence, development, and deployment of applications for a diverse array of clients.
Independent contract position where projects are assigned that are related to numerous topics including search engine evaulation, website analysis, speech / translation, and social media survey.
Created a website for green infrastructure technologies. Developed a task scheduling web application.
